zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertram de Verdun III於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿頓時，他的父親Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton44歲，母親Lesceline de Clinton27歲。他與Rohesia de Windsor結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1183年被列為sheriff of leicestershire。他去世於1192年8月25日在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾喬帕享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertram de Verdun III于大约1150年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿頓时，他的父亲Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton44岁，母亲Lesceline de Clinton27岁。他与Rohesia de Windsor结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1183年被列为sheriff of leicestershire。他去世于1192年8月25日在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾喬帕享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. Ravens were traditional symbols of wisdom in Germanic mythology; Odin was regularly accompanied by ravens called Hugin and Munin. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. See also Bertrand .

en.lifeSummary: When Bertram de Verdun III was born about 1150, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton, was 44 and his mother, Lesceline de Clinton, was 27. He married Rohesia de Windsor. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. In 1183, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as sheriff of leicestershire. He died on 25 August 1192, in Joppa, Transvaal, South Africa, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertram de Verdun III est né environ 1150, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lesceline de Clinton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Rohesia de Windsor. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. En 1183, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of leicestershire. Il est décédé le 25 août 1192, à Joppa, Transvaal, Afrique du Sud, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertram de Verdun III um 1150 in Alton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton 44 und seine Mutter Lesceline de Clinton 27. Er hat Rohesia de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1183, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of leicestershire aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. August 1192 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Joppa, Transvaal, Südafrika.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Verdun III è nato il circa 1150 nel Alton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Lesceline de Clinton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Rohesia de Windsor. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1183, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of leicestershire. Morì il 25 agosto 1192, nel Joppa, Transvaal, Sudafrica, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertram de Verdun IIIが約1150年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Altonは44歳，母Lesceline de Clintonは27歳であった。Rohesia de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1183年，34歳の時，職業はsheriff of leicestershireと記録されている。彼は1192年8月25日に南アフリカトランスヴァアルジョッパで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertram de Verdun III(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Lesceline de Clinton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Rohesia de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1183년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of leicestershire이었다. 그는 1192년 8월 25일 남아프리카 트랜스바앨 조파에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Verdun III nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lesceline de Clinton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Rohesia de Windsor. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1183, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of leicestershire. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1192, em Joppa, Transvaal, África do Sul, com 43 anos.

ro.Long Whatton, Leicestershire, England: Long Whatton, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertram de Verdun III родился около 1150 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lesceline de Clinton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohesia de Windsor. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1183 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of leicestershire. Он умер 25 августа 1192 г. в местности джоппа, трансвааль, Южная Африка в возрасте 43 лет.

es.Long Whatton, Leicestershire, England: Long Whatton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertram de Verdun III nació aproximadamente 1150, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Lesceline de Clinton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Rohesia de Windsor. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. En 1183, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of leicestershire. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1192, en Joppa, Transvaal, Sudáfrica, a la edad de 43 años.
